mapper.select:
SELECT a.comcode as comCode, a.comname as comName, a.groups as groups, a.groupscode as groupsCode, a.tjdate as tjDate, a.tjtime as maxTjTime, sum(ck_jsl) as ckJsl, sum(ck_jsl_wcl) as ckJslWcl, sum(ck_wcl) as ckWcl, sum(ds_tjl) as dsTjl, sum(ds_wcl) as dsWcl, sum(ds_zfl) as dsZfl, sum(shougen) as shouGen, sum(hougen) as houGen, sum(tiaojie) as tiaoJie, sum(ja) as ja, sum(zl) as zl FROM acd_dangri_gzl_group a WHERE a.tjdate >= #{startDate} AND a.tjdate <= #{endDate} AND a.groups is not null AND a.groupscode NOT IN ('5101701', '5101702', '5101703')
AND a.comcode = #{comCode}
AND a.groups like concat('%', #{groups}, '%')
GROUP BY a.comcode, a.comname, a.groups, a.groupscode, a.tjdate, a.tjtime ORDER BY a.comname, a.groupscode, a.tjdate

SELECT a.comcode as comCode, a.comname as comName, a.username as userName, a.usercode as userCode, a.groups as groups, a.groupscode as groupsCode, a.tjdate as tjDate, a.tjtime as maxTjTime, sum(ck_jsl) as ckJsl, sum(ck_jsl_wcl) as ckJslWcl, sum(ck_wcl) as ckWcl, sum(ds_tjl) as dsTjl, sum(ds_wcl) as dsWcl, sum(ds_zfl) as dsZfl, sum(shougen) as shouGen, sum(hougen) as houGen, sum(tiaojie) as tiaoJie, sum(ja) as ja, sum(zl) as zl FROM acd_dangri_gzl_ry a WHERE a.tjdate >= #{startDate} AND a.tjdate <= #{endDate} AND a.groups is not null AND a.groupscode NOT IN ('5101701', '5101702', '5101703')
AND a.groupscode = #{groupsCode}
AND a.username like concat('%', #{userName}, '%')
GROUP BY a.comcode, a.comname, a.username, a.usercode, a.groups, a.groupscode, a.tjdate, a.tjtime ORDER BY a.comname, a.groupscode, a.username, a.tjdate
SELECT DISTINCT comcode FROM acd_dangri_gzl_bm WHERE comname = #{comName} LIMIT 1
